channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overhanging Hedge, 21st April
item.description:
Hedge outside of 145 is overhanging and causing obstruction to footway. Please can this be inspected.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 112, Ravensbury Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More pavement parking, 21st April
item.description:
Large van & car totally blocking pavement. Also a black car causing obstruction. This is an ongoing problem. When will council wake up & take action to stop this happening?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redfern Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair dumped in street, 21st April
item.description:
Someone has left a chair on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St John's Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Bollards, 21st April
item.description:
Bollards left blocking pavement and parking bays from a funeral. Please cna they be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 153, Ravensbury Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on pavement, 21st April
item.description:
A brown glass bottle has shattered on the pavement near the rear entrance to the pub under the railway bridge on Penge Lane. Could be dangerous to kids and pets, please clear up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: FLytip, 21st April
item.description:
Bags left on highway outside of 131 Ravensbury Road. Please clear.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 110, Ravensbury Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London

item.title: Dumped mix of garden waste and other items, 21st April
item.description:
Dumped items by bin also the pavement in the area needs large amounts of bird droppings and also dog poo removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Bin area side of William hills, 21st April
item.description:
Smells bad needs jet washing under and around bins and wall next to bins please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Grove, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Bin overflowing, 21st April
item.description:
Bin not emptied now rubbish is flying around the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blue Anchor Lane, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Dead fox in the road just before Clover Cars Blackfen Rd, 21st April
item.description:
Dead fox in the road just before Clover Cars Blackfen Rd..Sidcup
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 184-214, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: RED VAN parked in shared space for over 2 years., 21st April
item.description:
This SORN vehicle is being used as a storage unit and parked in a public parking space not a driveway. This has been in the same spot for over 2 years!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clock Tower Mews, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st April
item.description:
Repeat fly tipping of household items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Western Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Food Van, 21st April
item.description:
This foodvan has been parked in a shared area for over a year. Registration plates are not on the vehicle. It very unfair for the rest of us who struggle to find space to park.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clock Tower Mews, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip end of Troughton Road, 21st April
item.description:
Another mattress and a sealed cardboard box with something inside. At end of Troughton near station canopy.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boring boring boring, 21st April
item.description:
This problem is so very tiresome.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Health and Safety Concern – Overgrown Tree Obstructing Footpath at 8 Albury Avenue DA7 4SJ, 21st April
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam, I hope you are well. I am writing to raise a health and safety concern regarding a tree at 8 Albury Avenue DA7 4SJ, and to kindly request the council’s assistance. The tree has become significantly overgrown, with branches extending from the lower/root area and obstructing the footpath. This is making it difficult for pedestrians to pass safely, particularly for children, parents with prams, and individuals with mobility needs. This is particularly worrying as there are children living at and visiting the property. Please note that the photographs provided only show some of the smaller branches that have fallen. Unfortunately, we do not have photos of the larger branches, but these have also come down during the wind and are of greater concern. We would be very grateful if this matter could be looked into and if an inspection could be arranged at your earliest convenience. Thank you very much for your time and assistance. Yours faithfully, Vandana

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albury Avenue, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over pavement, 21st April
item.description:
Bin bags have been left on the pavement and are ripped open with dirty nappies across the pavements.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac tampered with, 21st April
item.description:
Tarmac surrounding the roundabout play equipment in the Play park has been tampered with. There is a strong smell of smoke and burnt branches on the floor around it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blenheim Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish behind block D, Jam Factory, 21st April
item.description:
There is a significant accumulation of litter behind Block D of the Jam Factory. This area has not been cleared for some time and is now both unsightly and at risk of becoming a health hazard. The lack of basic upkeep is beginning to contribute to wider issues around neglect and antisocial behaviour.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rothsay Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light day burning opposite 124 Blackbrook Lane, 21st April
item.description:
Streetlight near traffic island opposite 124 Blackbrook Lane day burning for weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
